common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Use this API to set holiday periods in advance for automatic on/off of holiday mode and there are two holiday modes allowing sellers to choose whether to accept new orders during holiday.

request_params.description: Indicate whether to enable holiday mode for the shop. true means turn ON, false means turn OFF.
request_params.name: holiday_mode_on

request_params.description:
Holiday type:
0 - Full holiday，buyers cannot place new orders. The behavior remains consistent with the current Holiday Mode.

1 - Partial holiday, buyers can continue placing orders, and the system will automatically extend the order’s Ship-By-Date (SBD).
request_params.name: holiday_mode_type

request_params.description: Holiday start time should be whole hour and could be parsed as "2026:01:16 15:00:00"
request_params.name: holiday_mode_start_time

request_params.description:
Holiday end time plus one second should be whole hour, which means the input timestamp must be able to be parsed as "2025:01:20 17:59:59"


and the holiday_end_time must be larger than holiday_start_time
request_params.name: holiday_mode_end_time

response_params.description: Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
response_params.name: error

response_params.description: Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
response_params.name: message
request_id
response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking.

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/shop/set_shop_holiday_mode?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
  CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => '{
    "holiday_mode_description": "\\"Spring Festival\\"",
    "holiday_mode_end_time": 1773305999,
    "holiday_mode_on": true,
    "holiday_mode_start_time": 1770883200,
    "holiday_mode_type": 1
}',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;

import requests
import json

url = "https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/shop/set_shop_holiday_mode?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp"

payload=json.dumps({
  "holiday_mode_description": "\"Spring Festival\"",
  "holiday_mode_end_time": 1773305999,
  "holiday_mode_on": True,
  "holiday_mode_start_time": 1770883200,
  "holiday_mode_type": 1
})
headers = {
  'Content-Type': 'application/json'
}
response = requests.RPCRequest("POST",url,headers=headers, data=payload, allow_redirects=False)

print(response.text)
